videos.headline: Oklahoma scores TD with 15 seconds remaining to take lead
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel finds a wide-open Nic Anderson for a 3-yard touchdown and the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma scores TD with 15 seconds remaining to take lead) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel shines as Oklahoma picks up thrilling win over Texas
videos.description: After Texas takes the lead late, Dillon Gabriel comes up huge on the final drive, giving Oklahoma the Red River Rivalry win.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Dillon Gabriel shines as Oklahoma picks up thrilling win over Texas) 2023/10/07 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers gets picked off on Texas' second play
videos.description: Oklahoma's Gentry Williams jumps the rout to pick off Quinn Ewers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers gets picked off on Texas' second play) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Texas gets tricky on fourth-down play
videos.description: Texas picks up the first down on fourth and short as Savion Red fakes the run and floats it to Gunnar Helm for a huge gain.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas gets tricky on fourth-down play) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma gets 2nd INT of the day after huge hit
videos.description: Oklahoma's Billy Bowman Jr. gets a huge hit on a Texas receiver, leading to the ball bouncing up and into the arms of Kendel Dolby for the interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma gets 2nd INT of the day after huge hit) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas ties the score after blocking Oklahoma's punt for a TD
videos.description: Texas' Kitan Crawford blocks a punt and it lands in the hands of a teammate for a Longhorns touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas ties the score after blocking Oklahoma's punt for a TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Gabriel throws deep for 44-yard gain

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Gabriel throws deep for 44-yard gain) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Texas' Jonathon Brooks hauls in 1-handed catch

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas' Jonathon Brooks hauls in 1-handed catch) 2023/10/7

videos.headline: Texas' 4th-double gamble pays off as Ewers throws TD pass to Helm
videos.description: Texas goes for it on  fourth down as Quinn Ewers finds a wide open Gunnar Helm for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas takes lead with TD on 4th down) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tawee Walker scores short TD for Oklahoma
videos.description: Oklahoma responds to the Texas touchdown with a short Tawee Walker touchdown to regain the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tawee Walker scores short TD for Oklahoma) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Baker heartbroken after Oklahoma drops would-be TD
videos.description: Oklahoma drops an open touchdown, and Baker Mayfield can't believe it on the Pat McAfee simulcast.

videos.headline: Oklahoma's Walker hands Texas its largest deficit of season with TD
